case_title: SHI'AN RHONE VS. ALDO U.S. INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHONE, SHI'AN AS TO DEFENDANT ALDO U.S. INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RHONE, SHI'AN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALDO U.S. INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION $2,462.42 PRINCIPAL, $10.85 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,698.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
